title: adenophora rupestris
intro: Adenophora rupestris, also known as rock jasmine or mountain hyacinth, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Campanulaceae. It has been traditionally used in Eastern medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of adenophora rupestris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken to promote overall health and well-being.
